crime.value: Serial murders of young male adolescents (ages 16-18) found barefoot, killed by blows to the head
crime.quote: each victim is a young, male, adolescent, ages between sixteen and eighteen. He also observes that each victim is found

victim.value: Young men aged 16-18 including Harry Lodell (17, Caucasian) - targeting pattern unclear from excerpt

closed_world.value: Atlantic City, New Jersey area where the serial murders are occurring
closed_world.quote: homicide that took place in Atlantic City, New Jersey. As the killings increase

culprit_and_motive.value: Sass, motivated by searching for valuable pennies worth $71,000 total, killing to find them
culprit_and_motive.quote: If Sass didn't find the pennies he would still keep looking for them and killing for them

resolution.value: Police detective Baxter arrests Sass after discovering the penny collection motive through investigation
resolution.quote: I'm taking him off of the streets when I get back to the city

investigator.value: Alistair Basham, criminology professor at Princeton, consulted by Atlantic City Police for criminal profiling expertise
investigator.quote: Basham is contacted by the Atlantic City Police and asked for his expertise in constructing a criminal personality

suspect_architecture.value: Single identified suspect (Sass) motivated by valuable coin collection - serial killer targeting young males for rare pennies worth $71,000
suspect_architecture.quote: If Sass didn't find the pennies he would still keep looking for them and killing for them

red_herring.value: Location pattern misdirection - first two victims found in alleyways, third in apartment vestibule breaking expected pattern
red_herring.quote: No, not this time. It appears the murder was committed in the vestibule of the apartment building

clue_fairness.value: Consistent victim profile shared with reader - young males ages 16-18, all found barefoot, all killed by head trauma
clue_fairness.quote: each victim is a young, male, adolescent, ages between sixteen and eighteen... each victim is found with bare feet

social_world.value: Academic-police institutional cooperation - Princeton University criminologist consulted by Atlantic City Police for expertise
social_world.quote: Basham is contacted by the Atlantic City Police and asked for his expertise in constructing a criminal personality profile

reveal_mechanic.value: Numismatic motive - rare coin collection worth $71,000 drives the killings, revealed through investigation of victim possessions
reveal_mechanic.quote: Three coins $71,000.00 and we don't know how far it will go

media_and_audience.value: Press interviews leading to police consultation - media attention on expert brings official involvement in case
media_and_audience.quote: After being interviewed by press, Basham is contacted by the Atlantic City Police

_meta.title: ebook robert f clifton the case of the barefoot boys
